opinion.h: MASSEY v. GEORGIA. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF GEORGIA. No. 630, Misc. Decided November 7, 1966.
opinion.p: 222 Ga. 143, 149 S.E.2d 118, appeal dismissed and certiorari denied.
Floyd H. Wardlow, Jr., and John R. Rogers for appellant.
The appeal is dismissed for want of jurisdiction. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for a writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
385 U.S. 36 MATRANGA v. McDONNELL, SHERIFF. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF MISSISSIPPI. No. 686, Misc. Decided November 7, 1966.
Albert Sidney Johnston and John M. Sekul for appellant.
The appeal is dismissed for want of jurisdiction. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for a writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
